• HTML5 game with canvas rendering and MQTT networking
  • Mobile-optimized controls with touch support
  • Multiplayer functionality with real-time synchronization
  • Progressive web app features (offline, installable)
  • Advanced UI with custom modals and notifications
    class GameEngine { ... }
    class NetworkManager { ... }
    class SoundManager { ... }

Mega Miner NG is a browser-based mining game featuring procedurally generated terrain, multiplayer networking via MQTT, and a comprehensive upgrade system. The game includes mobile-optimized controls, real-time synchronization between players, and various gameplay mechanics like crafting, trading, and exploration. Built with modern web technologies, it offers a full-featured gaming experience with persistent progress tracking and cloud save functionality.
